summary: Russian operators of the "Rubicon" Center reported destroying 105 Ukrainian targets on April 16, 2026, including personnel and fixed-wing UAVs, and 1 target on April 17, including personnel, fixed-wing UAVs, long-range UAVs, and logistics routes in the Donbas, Krasny Liman, Sumy, and Belgorod directions. Ukrainian forces used FPV drones to kill two Russian soldiers on motorcycles and a Russian soldier who attempted to fake surrender before fleeing toward his comrades in the Kostiantynivka direction with the 36th Marine Brigade. Ukrainian electronic warfare crews were recorded interfering with Russian FPV drones, ordering them to land within 15 seconds, while Russian forces used drone detectors to identify incoming FPV threats.
